findings.title: Fake Laravel Packages on Packagist Deploy Cross-Platform RAT
findings.summary: Malicious Packagist packages impersonating Laravel utilities deploy cross-platform RAT via Composer dependency chain with obfuscated payloads.

findings.title: VMware Aria Operations CVE-2026-22719 — Federal Patch Deadline Set
findings.summary: CISA sets March 24 federal patch deadline; orgs recently migrated or planning migration are at highest risk.

findings.title: Europol Takes Down Tycoon 2FA Phishing-as-a-Service Platform
findings.summary: Europol dismantled Tycoon 2FA PhaaS platform linked to 64,000 AitM credential harvesting attacks; developer allegedly based in Pakistan.

findings.title: FBI and Europol Seize LeakBase Forum
findings.summary: Joint operation seized LeakBase forum with 142K+ members; all content including IP logs preserved for evidence and potential follow-on arrests.

noted.summary: Huntress mapped RaaS infrastructure via brute-force attack analysis.
Shifts to 2-week release cycle for faster security patches.
Fake Google security page uses PWA app to steal credentials and MFA codes.
